name: Portfolio Website
techStack: Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion

phases.name: Project Setup
phases.description: Create base app structure and starter pages.
phases.promptTemplate:
Create a Next.js 15 portfolio site scaffold.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create a clean project with TypeScript, Tailwind, src/app layout, globals.css, and a minimal home page that uses the client company name.

phases.name: Branding & Hero
phases.description: Create visual style, hero section, and CTA.
phases.promptTemplate:
Implement branding and hero for this portfolio.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Use the project name, description, and CTA text. Build a polished hero, clear value proposition, and mobile-first responsive layout.

phases.name: Projects Grid
phases.description: Build a projects/work section with reusable cards.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add a projects section for the portfolio.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create reusable project card components, sample project data, and a responsive grid section with hover effects.

phases.name: About & Services
phases.description: Add about content and service offerings section.
phases.promptTemplate:
Add About and Services sections.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create concise copy blocks and responsive cards for service offerings aligned with the project's tone.

phases.name: Contact & Lead Capture
phases.description: Create contact form and contact CTA area.
phases.promptTemplate:
Implement contact section and lead capture form.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Create form fields, validation, and a user-friendly success state. Keep implementation simple and production-ready.

phases.name: Animation & UX Polish
phases.description: Add subtle motion and smooth interactions.
phases.promptTemplate:
Polish UX and motion.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Use tasteful animations (Framer Motion), improve spacing/typography consistency, and ensure mobile performance is good.

phases.name: Final Review & Handoff
phases.description: Review accessibility, links, and deployment notes.
phases.promptTemplate:
Run a final review and handoff pass.

Client info:
{{clientInfo}}

Check broken links, heading order, basic accessibility, responsive behavior, and add concise README run/deploy instructions.
